title: rubus × preaubertii
intro: Rubus × preaubertii is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Rubus fruticosus and Rubus calycinoides, which belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is commonly known as the raspberry rose or black raspberry, and its leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × preaubertii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Rubus × preaubertii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its leaves and roots can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
